data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic commission calculation per booking. However, the evidence does not include any specific details or API responses that confirm the system's ability to automatically calculate commissions based on bookings. The linked use case mentions automatic commission tracking, but there is no concrete evidence provided to demonstrate that this functionality is implemented or functioning as required.
gaps: No evidence of automatic commission calculation per booking.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for commission calculation verification
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the commission is calculated automatically based on the booking details.
